title: Pipeline Job
description: Track the progress of a single file through the ingestion pipeline: WhiteRabbit scan → concept mapping → validation → ETL load. Each stage is shown with its current status and any errors.
tips: The pipeline stepper shows which stage is active, completed, or failed.
Failed stages show an error message — expand the error to see the full stack trace.
Validation errors list specific rows and columns that failed OMOP conformance checks.
Re-run a failed job after fixing the source data or mapping issue.
Completed ETL jobs show record counts per OMOP domain (person, visit, drug, etc.).
